description: This Java class implements business logic for handling supporting documents in a Spring Boot application. It handles uploading, listing, updating metadata, downloading, and deleting documents, including validation of file types, size limits, checksum computation, and persistence of both metadata and content.

classes.name: SupportingDocumentService
classes.description: Service class providing core functionalities for supporting documents including upload, list, update, download, and delete operations.

methods.name: upload
methods.description: Handles uploading of a supporting document, including validation, checksum calculation, storage, and database persistence.

methods.name: list
methods.description: Returns a list of document metadata entries for the specified user and optional loan draft ID.

methods.name: updateMetadata
methods.description: Replaces the metadata JSON of an owned document.

methods.name: getDownload
methods.description: Retrieves the resource for downloading a specified document, verifying ownership.

methods.name: delete
methods.description: Deletes a document and its stored content if owned by the user.
